description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI: Build Test that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to build and test on windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macos-latest environments with Qt 5.15.2. For each OS, check out the repository with submodules, set up the Qt environment, download and configure clang-tidy if necessary, build the project with cmake, and upload the resulting binary as an artifact.
